summary: Very good soundboard capture of a vibrant 1982 show with standout Space and Stella Blue moments despite an uneven second set.
review: The recording is praised for its very good sound quality, likely a clean sound‑board source. Fans rave about the trippy space jams and a beautiful rendition of Stella Blue, though one reviewer finds the second set only average. Overall the performance is highly regarded with just minor mixed feelings about pacing.

ai_rating.rationale: Three enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight excellent sound and standout moments, offset by a single 3‑star review noting an uneven second set; overall the show and recording are viewed favorably.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as very good/clear with no major issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as mixed but partly awesome; second set considered rough‑to‑average by one reviewer, though overall the night is celebrated for its high energy and improvisational peaks.
